_comment: Maps levelID + chapterIndex to a sketch-style scene image, and levelID to a conclusion comic. All URLs are relative paths into the local /assets folder — place this assets.json alongside index.html, with an assets/ folder next to it containing these exact filenames. Nothing in script.js needs to change to use local files instead of remote placeholders.

1.alt: Pencil-sketch of the Voss Estate library, a shattered display case at its center
1.caption: THE SCENE — Voss Estate Library

2.alt: Sketch of a folded coded note tucked into a coat lining
2.caption: THE EVIDENCE — Coded Note

3.alt: Sketch of a dockmaster's office terminal glowing in a dark harbor building
3.caption: THE TRAIL — Wharf Office

1.alt: Sketch of four breached bank vaults in a dim corridor
1.caption: THE SCENE — Blackwood Trust

2.alt: Sketch of a second coded note pinned to a corkboard
2.caption: THE EVIDENCE — Second Note

3.alt: Sketch of an old freight office terminal among rail yard crates
3.caption: THE TRAIL — Freight Office

1.alt: Sketch of Ashcombe Manor's east hall with clues scattered about
1.caption: THE SCENE — Ashcombe Manor

2.alt: Sketch of a third, more elaborate coded note under a desk lamp
2.caption: THE EVIDENCE — Third Note

3.alt: Sketch of a study terminal beneath a tall east-facing window at dawn
3.caption: THE TRAIL — East Study

easy.caption: The full account — from the shattered case to the butler's falsified alibi.

medium.caption: The full account — from the four vaults to the recovered prize.

hard.caption: The full account — from Ashcombe Manor to the true will, revealed.
